allow: PowerShell($r1 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/me" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer u-demo.fakesignature"} -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $r2 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/me" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $r3 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; "fakeToken=$r1 noAuth=$r2 pageNoCookie=$r3")
Bash(git -c user.name="GoldSave Dev" -c user.email="dev@goldsave.la" commit -m "Initial commit: GoldSave Laos web + mobile + Supabase backend")
